rows.label: qev041406_MSG0001
rows.name: That massive explosion just now definitely came from the direction of Pissa's caravan, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0002
rows.name: I thoroughly taught Potepote how to make the fireworks, though...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0003
rows.name:
...Yes, this is Pissa, mo!
Is that you, Potepote, mo?![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0004
rows.name:
The fireworks suddenly went BOOM, mo!
I did exactly as you told me, so this is strange, mo! Take responsibility for this, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0005
rows.name: Umm... did you add the exact amount of autiga powder that I told you to, mo?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0006
rows.name:
I do not have time to measure things one by one, mo.
But I added a whole lot of it so it would be a spectacular firework, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0007
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0008
rows.name:
More importantly, the explosion blew me away and now I am on top of a flying ship near the caravan, mo.
Hurry up and come save me, Pissa, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0009
rows.name: ...Ah, my stomach is also completely empty, so I want you to bring me some coldberries while you are at it, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0010
rows.name: By the way, if you do not flavor them with spicy sacrifole pollen, I will absolutely not eat them, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0011
rows.name: ......[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0012
rows.name:
*Cough*... Why have you frozen up, mo?
If your tummy hurts, I will massage it for you, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0013
rows.name: Gah! Do not touch me, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0014
rows.name:
I am absolutely done with these people, mo!
That is right! Pissa is going to start a second life in this city of Earthlings, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_JNK0010
rows.name: Stop

rows.label: qev041406_SEL0011
rows.name: Soothe the angry Pissa and stop her.

rows.label: qev041406_JNK0020
rows.name: Let her go

rows.label: qev041406_SEL0021
rows.name: Let Pissa go just like that.

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0015
rows.name:
I have reached the absolute limit of my patience, mo!
Potepote and the Elder can both rot in hell, mo!
Now then, farewell, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0016
rows.name:
I am so glad that you at least understand me, mo!
Potepote and the Elder can both rot in hell, mo!
Now then, farewell, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0017
rows.name: Oh dear... She is gone, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0018
rows.name:
Well, it cannot be helped, mo.
For now, please go check on how Potepote is doing, mo.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0019
rows.name:
Eeek! What wonderful clothes, mo!
I want to try wearing something that shiny, mo![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev041406_MSG0020
rows.name:
...Huh? Potepote? Who is that, mo?
I do not know anyone by that name, mo.[ST:wait ]
